Description.description: This table contains records of loan commission approvals.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Email for accounting purposes
Type of approval
Code for the commission

Poor man's config: simple string, we check it for "contains" various things like "NoRegion" to hide Region links. Known options: AccountingDisabled; See SetupQuery for known options. RegionDisabled; BranchDisabled; PrintDisabled; ProfileDisabled; AssignmentDisabled
On page /Loan-Officers, controls whether the "Current Debt Balance" is displayed.
Unique identifier for entity instances
The base URL used in Dataflows that use an OData.Feed(url) as their source: branches, periods, etc.
Primary key, links to systemId in OData endpoint /CommissionSetup
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Owner Id
Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record
Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.
Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.
Status of the lvcSetup
Status of the LVCompCommissionSetup
Reason for the status of the lvcSetup
Reason for the status of the LVCompCommissionSetup
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
